summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite, alongside embedded firmware for input emulation, a Windows kernel driver, and AI/ML research projects. Also maintained Android apps, personal tooling, and several trading-related utilities.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a Windows kernel driver for input filtering and injection, adding push-style event delivery and integration tests.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Started an Android TTS engine project using Silero models with voice API and accent support.

items.title: E-ink firmware expansion
items.description: Expanded custom e-reader firmware with a knowledge base app and mesh chat fixes.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Iterated on a SaaS crypto algo-trading platform, building out proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, billing, and a .NET rewrite.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for an ESP32-S3 mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer file-tagging utility, working on release pipelines and metadata handling.

items.title: CV and input emulation research
items.description: Worked on a computer vision and input emulation research project, adding aim assist and overlay features.

items.title: E-ink reader custom firmware
items.description: Built custom firmware for an e-ink reader, adding a map viewer and knowledge base app.

items.title: Clash proxy client fork
items.description: Maintained a Clash proxy client fork, updating the core and adding transport support.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an Android LLM assistant with phone-use capabilities, focusing on sub-agent delegation and model management.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted research on crypto price prediction models, experimenting with mixture-of-experts architectures.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Developed a note-taking focused Android launcher for e-ink devices.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and dead code detection.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE configuration, updating for newer versions and adding remote clipboard support.

items.title: n8n Telegram node fork
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram node for n8n automation, fixing auth and CI issues.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based YOLO labeling tool for personal projects.

items.title: Dotfiles management
items.description: Set up chezmoi-managed dotfiles with encrypted secrets.

items.title: Poker computer vision research
items.description: Worked on a computer vision project for online poker, implementing hand history extraction and validation.

items.title: Claude Code n8n node
items.description: Updated an n8n node for Claude Code, migrating to the agent SDK.

items.title: Android tasker utility
items.description: Started an Android task management utility with touch event visualization.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram multi-bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot manager for Freqtrade, adding a web dashboard and profit calculations.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with worktree management and git rules.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor
items.description: Built a Flutter mobile app for monitoring Freqtrade bot performance.

items.title: Telegram automation bot
items.description: Worked on a Telegram automation bot for content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Content collector service
items.description: Built a content collection service with webhook and ad filtering capabilities.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Optimized trading strategies for Freqtrade, focusing on hyperparameter tuning.

items.title: Crypto signaler Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for crypto signaling with AI-powered analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET ChatGPT Telegram bot, adding long message support.
